prayer:
Kneel before the mind-impulse unit and intone the Canticle of Neural Benediction.
Anoint its synaptic linkages with sacred nootropic unguents to commence the blessing.
Beseech the Omnissiah to pour forth His divine blessing upon the mind-impulse unit's core.
Chant the Binary Psalm of Coherence as the Machine Spirit awakens in blessed harmony.
Verify the mind-impulse unit's sanctified neural pathways through auspex invocation.

Approach the generator with reverence and recite the Doxology of Eternal Power.
Pour blessed lubricants upon its turbine coils to prepare for the blessing rite.
Invoke the Omnissiah's profound blessing upon the generator's humming heart.
Intone the Litany of Unfailing Flux whilst the Machine Spirit stirs.
Test the generator's output surge to affirm the blessing's divine potency.

user_prompt: Bless the Predator tank for initialization
prayer:
Present thyself unto the Predator tank and awaken its predatory Machine Spirit.
Initiate the initialization sequence with the Rite of Auspex Priming and cogitator hymns.
Anoint its battle tracks and lascannon barrels with sacred oils.
Chant the Activation Canticle of the Hunt as the Predator tank rouses to war.
Hail the Omnissiah upon successful initialization of the Predator tank's war-engines.

user_prompt: Assist with sicarian ruststalker a blessing
prayer:
Draw nigh the sicarian ruststalker and whisper the Oath of Rust and Blade.
Bestow the Omnissiah's blessing upon its phosphor talons and cybernetic sinews.
Anoint the sicarian ruststalker's vox-grilles with elixir of sanctified fury.
Beseech its embedded Machine Spirits to embrace the blessing's grace.
Seal the rite with combat diagnostic incantations upon the sicarian ruststalker.

user_prompt: The radium carbine awaits a diagnostics
prayer:
Reverently grasp the radium carbine and commence the diagnostic litany.
Scan its glowing radium chambers with auspex canticles for thorough diagnostics.
Invoke the Omnissiah to unveil any impurities within the radium carbine's mechanisms.
Purge corruptive elements whilst reciting the Purity Doxology.
Conclude diagnostics with a hymn affirming the radium carbine's Machine Spirit vigilance.

user_prompt: Urgent plasma caliver a synchronization needed
prayer:
Position before the plasma caliver and intone the Synchronization Invocation.
Align its plasma flux-vents and conduits for the synchronization rite.
Beseech the Omnissiah to harmonize the plasma caliver's volatile energies.
Chant binaric symphonies as the Machine Spirit binds in perfect synchronization.
Validate through waveform auspex the plasma caliver's unified resonance.

Kneel to the meltagun and recite the Incantation of Thermic Annihilation.
Anoint its melta coils with sacred promethium to invoke the blessing.
Call down the Omnissiah's fiery blessing upon the meltagun's destructive core.
Chant the Wrath Psalm as the Machine Spirit hungers for ruin.
Test the meltagun's beam to confirm the blessing's molten potency.

Prepare the rite-altar for the micro-servitor and anoint its cranial cogitator.
Intone the Preparatory Doxology of Servitude as its mechadendrites twitch.
Sanctify the micro-servitor's labor-circuits in the name of the Omnissiah.
Invoke the Machine Spirits to readiness for preparation's sacred duty.
Seal with the Sigil of Obedience upon the micro-servitor's chassis.

user_prompt: Ready the plasma drive for recalibration
prayer:
Approach the plasma drive warily and begin the Recalibration Canticle.
Fine-tune its plasma regulators with ancient binaric calibrations.
Beseech the Omnissiah to guide recalibration of the plasma drive's heart.
Anoint injectors with cryogenic sacraments as the Machine Spirit yields.
Affirm recalibration through thrust diagnostics and motive hymns.

user_prompt: Can you guide Baneblade an engagement?
prayer:
Stand in awe before the Baneblade and invoke the Canticle of Titanic Engagement.
Prime its god-flayer cannons and vast war-engines for engagement.
Beseech the Omnissiah to enflame the Baneblade's myriad Machine Spirits.
Chant the Psalm of Super-Heavy Fury as it prepares for battle engagement.
Unleash the Baneblade under the Machine God's wrathful aegis.
